CREATE TABLE nested_dates (id UInt32, date_string String);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_string) AS parsed_date FROM nested_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM nested_dates WHERE id < 3);
CREATE TABLE complex_join (id UInt32, string_date String, more_info String);
SELECT c.id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(c.string_date) AS parsed_date, c.more_info FROM complex_join c JOIN (SELECT id FROM complex_join WHERE id > 1) AS subquery ON c.id = subquery.id;
CREATE TABLE date_results AS SELECT parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_string) AS result FROM dates_test;
SELECT * FROM date_results WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE filtered_dates AS SELECT parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_string) as valid_dates FROM dates_test WHERE date_string NOT LIKE '%invalid%';
